title: May Attach To
description:
Allowlist which specifies where the block can be placed.

Properties:
• min_sides_must_attach (int)
• auto_rotate (boolean)
• top (string[])
• bottom (string[])
• north (string[])
• east (string[])
• south (string[])
• west (string[])
• ... and 3 more properties

min_sides_must_attach.title: Min Sides Must Attach
min_sides_must_attach.description: Number of side faces that need to pass the attach conditions before the block can be placed. Default value is four.

auto_rotate.title: Auto Rotate
auto_rotate.description: Automatically rotate the block to attach sensibly. This setting is ignored if 'randomize_rotation' is enabled.

defaultSnippets.label: May Attach To
defaultSnippets.description: Allowlist which specifies where the block can be placed.
